verses.text: Moses in Israel minam lutangte tungah, “ Topa' thupiak hih bang ahi hi

Mi khat in Topa' tungah thuciamna a ciam ciang ahi a, amah in a zuih dingin kiciamna a bawl ciang ahi zongin, amah ciampello ding a, ama kamsung panin a gingkhiate khempeuh tawh kizui-in gamta ding hi
“Tua ahih kei leh, numei khat in Topa' tungah thuciamna bawlin, a pa' inn sungah nungakin a om sungin kamciamna tawh amah kikhihtawm a
amah in a zuih dingin thuciamna leh kamciamnate a bawlna a pa in za napi-in ama tungah bangmah a cih kei leh, ama thuciamna khempeuh kip ding a, amah a kikhih tawmna kamciamna khempeuh kip ding hi

Ahih hangin a pa in a zak ni-in a lungkimlohna a tanu' tungah a gen leh, tuanu' thuciamna, amah a kikhih tawmna kamciamnate khat zong kiplo ding hi. A pa in nial ahih manin Topa in tuanu maisak ding hi
“Tua numei, pasal khat tawh kiteng a, amah a kikhih tawmna thuciamna ahi a, ngaihsun lopi-in a kampaunate ahi zongin
a pasal in za a, a zak ni-in a zi' tungah bangmah a cih kei leh tua numei' thuciamna kip ding a, amah a kikhih tawmna a kamciam kip ding hi

Ahih hangin, a pasal in tua thu a zak ni-in a lungkimlohna a gen leh, amah a kikhih tawmna ahi numei' tunga om kamciamna leh ngaihsun lopi-in a kampaunate amah in phiatsak ding a, Topa in tuanu maisak ding hi
“Ahih hangin meigong numei' thuciamna ahi a, a ki-ma numei' thuciamna ahi zongin, amah a kikhih tawmna peuhmah ama tungah kip ding hi
“Numei khat in a pasal' inn sungah thu a ciam ahi a, kiciamna khat tawh kamciamin amah a kikhih tawmna ahi zongin
a pasal in za a, a zi' tungah bangmah ciloin, a nial kei leh, ama thuciamna khempeuh kip ding a, amah a kikhih tawmna thuciamna khempeuh zong kip ding hi

Ahih hangin a pasal in tua thute a zak ni-in a phiatsak leh, ama thuciamna tawh kisai-in a kam panin a gingkhia peuhmah ahi a, amahmah a kamciamna tawh kisaite ahi zongin kiplo ding hi. A pasal in tuate phiatsak ahih manin Topa in tuanu maisak ding hi
Thuciamna khatpeuh ahi a, an tang dingin a kikhihna kamciam khatpeuh ahi zongin, a pasal in kipsak thei, a pasal in phiatsak thei hi

Ahih hangin a pasal in tua a kiciam ni-a kipanin a zi' tungah bangmah a cih kei leh, amah in a zi' tunga om thuciamna khempeuh hita leh a kamciam khempeuh hita leh a kipsak ahi hi. Amah in tuate a zak ni-in ama tungah bangmah cilo ahih manin tuate a kipsak ahi hi
Ahih hangin amah in tuate a zak khit ciangin a nung phiat leh, amah in a zi' mawhna pua ding hi,” a ci hi
Hihte pen, pasal leh a zi, leh a pa' inn sungah nungakin a om laitakin a pa leh a tanu' kikalah a om, Topa in Moses a piak ngeinate ahi hi.
